title: Goldfish Growth
description: Do goldfish grow, and what factors affect their size and growth rate?
narrative: The user wants factual information on whether goldfish increase in size over time, typical adult dimensions, and the environmental or care conditions (e.g., temperature, diet, tank size) that influence their growth. Relevant content should address growth rates, optimal temperature ranges for growth, and any other factors that impact size development.

title: Wi‑Fi vs Bluetooth
description: What are the key differences between Wi‑Fi and Bluetooth in terms of function, performance, range, power usage, and security?
narrative: The user seeks a comparative overview of Wi‑Fi and Bluetooth technologies. Relevant documents should clearly explain each technology, contrast their typical use cases, data rates, range, power consumption, and security mechanisms (e.g., WPA2/AES‑256 for Wi‑Fi vs. AES‑128 for Bluetooth). Sources that provide side‑by‑side feature tables, advantages, disadvantages, and practical examples of when to use one over the other satisfy the need.

title: US WWI Entry
description: Why did the United States voluntarily enter World War I?
narrative: The user seeks an explanation of the motivations behind the United States' decision to join World War I, looking for political, economic, and military factors such as German unrestricted submarine warfare, the Zimmermann Telegram, Wilson's ideological goals, and congressional actions. Relevant documents should describe the events and arguments that led to the April 1917 declaration of war on Germany and subsequent involvement.

title: Declaratory Judgment Definition
description: What is the legal definition of a declaratory judgment and how does it function in civil procedure?
narrative: The user seeks a concise, authoritative definition of a declaratory judgment, including its purpose, the circumstances under which it may be sought, and any procedural requirements such as motions, affidavits, or summary judgment aspects. Relevant results should explain the concept in plain language, cite applicable statutes or rules, and illustrate how declaratory judgments are used in litigation.

title: Right Pelvic Pain
description: What are the possible causes of right pelvic pain?
narrative: The user is seeking a comprehensive list of medical conditions that can produce pain localized to the right side of the pelvis. Relevant documents should discuss differential diagnoses for right pelvic pain in both women and men, covering common, less common, and serious etiologies such as appendicitis, colon cancer, constipation, Crohn's disease, diverticulitis, fibromyalgia, inguinal hernia, interstitial cystitis, and other conditions that may present with right-sided pelvic discomfort.

title: Social Determinants
description: What are the social determinants of health and how do they affect health outcomes?
narrative: The user seeks a comprehensive description of the social determinants of health, including the specific conditions (e.g., where people are born, live, learn, work, play, worship, and age) that influence health, functioning, and quality‑of‑life. Relevant documents should define these determinants, list examples, and explain their impact on health outcomes.

title: Legionella Pneumonia
description: Is Legionella pneumophila a cause of pneumonia?
narrative: The user wants to confirm whether Legionella pneumophila is a known pathogen that can cause pneumonia. Relevant documents should explicitly state that Legionella pneumophila is a causative agent of (often atypical) pneumonia, and may provide supporting details such as its role in disease, clinical presentation, and distinction from other bacterial causes.

title: Jamaica Weather
description: What are the current weather conditions in Jamaica?
narrative: The user is looking for up‑to‑date weather information for Jamaica, ideally including temperature, sky condition, humidity, wind, and any location‑specific details (e.g., Montego Bay, Kingston). Relevant documents should provide a recent or real‑time forecast or observation for Jamaican cities or the country as a whole, covering temperature ranges, precipitation, visibility, and atmospheric pressure.

title: Cerebral Palsy Dysarthria Types
description: What are the different types of dysarthria that can occur in individuals with cerebral palsy?
narrative: The user is seeking a comprehensive overview of the classifications of dysarthria specifically linked to cerebral palsy, including the names of each type, their defining speech characteristics, and any relevant clinical descriptions. Relevant documents should explicitly discuss dysarthria in the context of cerebral palsy and provide a clear enumeration or description of the distinct dysarthria sub‑types.

title: Robert Gray Biography
description: Who was Robert Gray and what were his notable achievements?
narrative: The user seeks biographical information about the historical figure Robert Gray, specifically the American sea captain known for exploring and naming the Columbia River in 1792. Relevant documents should identify him, describe his role as a captain, and detail his key contributions to exploration and maritime history.

title: Sous Vide Foods
description: What types of food can be prepared using the sous‑vide method?
narrative: The user seeks a comprehensive list of foods that are suitable for sous‑vide cooking, including meats, poultry, fish, seafood, vegetables, eggs, and desserts, along with brief guidance on typical temperature ranges or preparation tips. Relevant documents should enumerate these food categories, provide example dishes or cooking times, and explain why they work well with sous‑vide. Content that does not discuss specific foods or their suitability for sous‑vide (e.g., unrelated temperature tables) is not relevant.

title: Flea Life Cycle
description: What is the typical duration of a flea's life cycle?
narrative: The user is seeking information about how long it takes for a flea to develop from egg to adult, including the range of time under various environmental conditions. Relevant documents should describe the four developmental stages (egg, larva, pupa, adult) and provide estimates of the total cycle length—from a few weeks to several months—while noting factors such as temperature and humidity that influence the duration.

title: Contour Plowing Benefits
description: What can contour plowing reduce?
narrative: The user is looking for information on the specific negative effects that contour plowing helps to diminish. Relevant documents should describe how contour plowing reduces soil erosion, surface runoff, sediment loss, water loss, and related environmental impacts on sloping farmland. Sources that discuss the mechanism of contour plowing and list the types of erosion or runoff it mitigates are considered relevant.

title: Salvation Army founding
description: What year was the Salvation Army founded?
narrative: The user wants the specific year (and optionally the exact date) when the Salvation Army was established. Relevant results should state the founding year (e.g., 1865) and may include brief historical context confirming that date.

title: Active Margin Definition
description: What is an active margin in geological terms?
narrative: The user is seeking a concise definition and explanation of an active continental margin, including its characteristic features such as narrow continental shelves, oceanic trenches, and the presence of subduction faults that mark plate convergence. Relevant material should clearly describe what makes a margin 'active' versus passive.

title: RN vs BSN
description: What are the key differences between a Registered Nurse (RN) and a Bachelor of Science in Nursing (BSN) degree?
narrative: The user seeks a comparative overview of RN and BSN qualifications, covering education requirements, scope of practice, career opportunities, and advantages of each path; relevant documents should explain how RN and BSN roles overlap and differ, including discussion of job prospects, further education bridges, and professional outcomes.

title: Medicare Ventilation Definition
description: What is Medicare's official definition of mechanical ventilation and its coverage criteria?
narrative: The user seeks authoritative Medicare (CMS) language that defines "mechanical ventilation," including any distinctions between invasive and non‑invasive forms, and the specific conditions under which Medicare considers it a reimbursable service. Relevant documents should contain the formal definition, policy references, and eligibility or coverage guidelines.

title: Trapezoid Midsegment
description: How can I find or calculate the midsegment (median) of a trapezoid?
narrative: The user is looking for a clear method to determine the midsegment of a trapezoid, including its definition, the formula for its length (the average of the two bases), and any geometric construction steps. Relevant information should explain that the midsegment is a line parallel to the bases and equidistant from them, provide the length calculation, and describe how to locate or draw it in a given trapezoid.

title: AML Surveillance Analyst
description: What are the responsibilities, required skills, and typical duties of an AML surveillance analyst?
narrative: The user wants a comprehensive definition of the AML surveillance analyst role, covering primary functions such as monitoring and analyzing transactions for suspicious activity, ensuring compliance with anti‑money‑laundering regulations, generating reports, and coordinating with compliance and investigations teams. Relevant information should also include typical qualifications, certifications, tools used, work environment, and how the role differs from related positions like BSA or fraud analysts. Documents that describe these duties, regulatory context, and required competencies are considered relevant.

title: Thai Daily Life
description: What are the typical daily routines, work habits, cultural practices, and leisure activities of people living in Thailand?
narrative: The user seeks a comprehensive overview of everyday life in Thailand, including how people spend their time at work, home, school, and during leisure; common foods, transportation, social customs, and differences between urban and rural lifestyles. Relevant documents should describe day‑to‑day activities, cultural norms, and typical schedules of Thai residents.

title: SIGMET Definition
description: What is a SIGMET and how is it defined?
narrative: The user is seeking a clear, concise definition of a SIGMET, including its full form, purpose, and the types of weather phenomena it covers. Relevant documents should explicitly define SIGMET, describe its role in aviation weather reporting, and may provide examples of conditions that trigger a SIGMET issuance.

title: Concrete Flooring Cost
description: What are the typical costs per square foot for interior concrete flooring, including basic, polished, stained, and decorative‑scored options?
narrative: The user seeks price information for interior concrete floors. Relevant documents should give cost estimates (e.g., $/sq ft) for basic concrete, polished concrete, and variations that involve staining or decorative scoring, and should distinguish between residential and commercial applications where available.

title: Popular Swiss Food
description: What is the most popular food in Switzerland?
narrative: The user seeks a definitive answer identifying the single most popular Swiss food, supported by evidence such as consumption statistics, surveys, cultural prominence, or widespread recognition. Relevant documents should name a specific dish (e.g., fondue, rösti, chocolate) as the top favorite and provide supporting data or authoritative statements that justify its ranking.

title: Warm-blooded sharks
description: Which shark species are warm‑blooded and how do they maintain a body temperature higher than the surrounding water?
narrative: The user seeks factual information about shark species that exhibit endothermy (e.g., lamnid sharks such as great white, shortfin mako, salmon shark) and the physiological mechanisms—like a rete mirabile and regional heating—that allow them to keep their body temperature above ambient water. Relevant documents must describe these warm‑blooded shark examples and explain how they achieve elevated body temperatures.

title: Durable Medical Equipment
description: What items are classified as durable medical equipment and what does the category consist of?
narrative: The user wants a clear definition of durable medical equipment (DME) and a comprehensive list of the specific items that fall under this category (e.g., wheelchairs, walkers, hospital beds, oxygen supplies, etc.). Relevant content should explain the criteria that make a product DME, enumerate common examples, and may reference standard classifications or Medicare coverage guidelines.

title: Exon Definition
description: What is an exon and how is it defined in molecular biology?
narrative: The user seeks a clear, concise definition of an exon, including its role as a coding segment of a gene that remains in the mature mRNA after RNA splicing. Relevant documents should explain that exons are the expressed sequences that are joined together by spliceosomes, contrast them with introns, and may mention their importance in producing functional proteins.

title: Visceral Definition
description: What does the term "visceral" mean?
narrative: The user wants a clear definition of "visceral," including both its literal sense (relating to internal organs) and its figurative sense (describing instinctive, deep emotional or physical reactions). Relevant results should provide concise definitions, etymology, and illustrative examples that explain how the word is used in both contexts.

title: Tracheids Component
description: Which plant vascular tissue includes tracheids?
narrative: The user is looking for the higher‑order plant structure that tracheids belong to. Relevant information should state that tracheids are part of the xylem, a type of vascular tissue in terrestrial plants that transports water and provides structural support.

title: RSA Definition
description: What is RSA and how are its encryption keys defined?
narrative: The user seeks a clear explanation of the RSA cryptosystem, including the meaning of the acronym (Rivest‑Shamir‑Adleman) and a description of the public and private keys used in RSA encryption. Relevant documents should provide the definition of RSA and details about its key generation and usage.

title: CIS Founding Members
description: Who were the original members that formed the Commonwealth of Independent States?
narrative: The user wants to identify the states that initially created the Commonwealth of Independent States after the dissolution of the Soviet Union in December 1991. Relevant results should list the founding member countries, the date of formation, and any brief context about how the alliance was established.

title: LVH Causes
description: What are the possible causes of left ventricular hypertrophy?
narrative: The user wants a comprehensive list of etiologies that can lead to left ventricular hypertrophy, covering both primary (e.g., hypertrophic cardiomyopathy, genetic mutations) and secondary factors (e.g., chronic hypertension, aortic stenosis, athletic training, obesity, metabolic disorders). Relevant documents should explicitly identify and explain each cause, describe the underlying pathophysiology, and distinguish pathological from physiological hypertrophy.

title: LPS Laws
description: What are the LPS laws and how are they defined?
narrative: The user seeks a clear definition and explanation of the Lanterman‑Petris‑Short (LPS) statutes, including their purpose, key provisions, and relationship to civil commitment and involuntary hospitalization. Relevant documents should provide an authoritative definition, legal context, historical background, and discussion of the impact of LPS laws on mental health treatment and admission practices.

title: Three Percenters Overview
description: What are the Three Percenters and what do they represent?
narrative: The user wants a concise overview of the Three Percenters militia movement, covering its origins, ideological stance, claimed historical lineage, and current activities; relevant documents should clearly explain who they are, what they stand for, and how they are described in public discourse.

title: Military Suicide Causes
description: What are the main factors that contribute to suicide among military personnel?
narrative: The user is looking for a comprehensive overview of the underlying causes and risk factors associated with suicide in the armed forces, including mental‑health issues (e.g., PTSD, depression), operational stressors (combat exposure, deployment cycles), cultural and institutional influences, access to lethal means, and demographic trends. Relevant documents should discuss empirical research, statistical data, and expert analysis that explain why service members may be at heightened risk of suicide.

title: Theraderm Use
description: What are the purposes and applications of Theraderm products?
narrative: The user wants to know what Theraderm is used for, specifically the types of skin‑care products it offers and their intended benefits such as anti‑aging, moisturizing, and acne treatment. Relevant documents should describe Theraderm as a manufacturer of clinical‑grade skin‑care products, mention its anti‑aging creams, moisturizers, and the acne system marketed under the Reversion brand, and explain the intended uses of these products.

title: Famvir Indications
description: What conditions is Famvir prescribed to treat?
narrative: The user seeks information about the medical uses of Famvir (famciclovir), including the viral infections it is indicated for (e.g., herpes simplex, shingles, genital herpes) and any prescribing considerations. Relevant documents should clearly state the approved indications, typical dosing regimens, and comparisons to alternative antivirals such as valacyclovir and acyclovir.

title: Environmental Anthropology
description: What definition does anthropology give to the term 'environment'?
narrative: The user wants an academic explanation of how anthropologists define 'environment,' focusing on the conceptual framework used in environmental anthropology. Relevant material should provide a clear definition, discuss the relationship between humans and their environment as understood in anthropology, and may reference sub‑fields such as environmental anthropology or cultural ecology. Sources that only mention the word in unrelated contexts (e.g., forensic anthropology) are not relevant.

title: Axon Terminal Definition
description: What is the definition and function of an axon terminal (also called a synaptic knob)?
narrative: The user is looking for a concise, authoritative definition of an axon terminal/synaptic knob, including its structural characteristics, location on a neuron, and role in neurotransmitter release. Relevant passages should explicitly define the term, describe its morphology, and explain its function in synaptic transmission.

title: CDG Location
description: Is Charles de Gaulle Airport located within the main city of Paris?
narrative: The user wants to know whether CDG (Charles de Gaulle) airport is considered part of Paris proper, i.e., within the city limits, or if it lies outside the central metropolitan area. Relevant documents should describe the geographic location of CDG relative to Paris, mention if it is in the suburbs or the city boundaries, and provide distance or directional information that clarifies its status as being 'in main Paris' or not.

title: Monotonic Function Example
description: What are some concrete examples of monotonic functions?
narrative: The user is looking for specific mathematical functions that are monotonic—either non‑decreasing or non‑increasing—over their domain. Relevant documents should present at least one clear example (e.g., absolute value, linear, exponential, logarithmic) and explain why the function satisfies monotonicity (such as describing intervals of increase or decrease).

title: Spruce Physical Description
description: What are the physical characteristics of spruce trees?
narrative: The user seeks a botanical description of spruce trees, including details such as needle color and shape, bark texture, overall form, size, and cone appearance. Relevant documents should provide clear morphological information about spruce species (e.g., blue spruce) that answers this description request.

title: Hydrogen Liquid Temp
description: Below what temperature does hydrogen become a liquid?
narrative: The user wants a precise temperature (or temperature range) at which hydrogen transitions from gas to liquid, including the boiling point in any common unit (°F, °C, or K). Relevant documents must state this temperature range or point and may also note the solidification point for context. Sources that only discuss hydrogen's other properties (e.g., flammability, uses) without providing the liquid-phase temperature are not relevant.

title: McDouble vs Double
description: What are the differences between a McDouble and a double cheeseburger?
narrative: The user wants a clear comparison of the two McDonald’s menu items, covering ingredients (e.g., number of beef patties, cheese slices, toppings), preparation, price, and nutritional facts; relevant documents should explicitly explain how the McDouble differs from the double cheeseburger in composition, cost, and menu placement.
